name: Goddess of the Two Sides
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>表</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>裏</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>り</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>女</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>め</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がみ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 monster from your Deck to your hand that has a coin tossing effect, except "Goddess of the Two Sides". During your Main Phase: You can toss a coin and call it. If you call it right, double the ATK of all monsters you currently control until the end of this turn. If you call it wrong, send as many monsters you control to the GY as possible (min. 1), and if you do, draw 1 card. You can only use each effect of "Goddess of the Two Sides" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 monster from your Deck to your hand that has a coin tossing effect, except "Goddess of the Two Sides". During your Main Phase: You can toss a coin and call it. If you call it right, double the ATK of all monsters you currently control until the end of this turn. If you call it wrong, send as many monsters you control to the GY as possible (min. 1), and if you do, draw 1 card. You can only use each effect of "Goddess of the Two Sides" once per turn.

action: Sends from your field to your Graveyard
